title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 20 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 20 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 20 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/10/2025
On October 20, DCE i2601 Iron Ore Futures Contract closed at 767 yuan/mt, down 0.58% from the previous trading day. Spot cargoes at majorports fell by 1-5 yuan/mt, with PB fines transac on prices in Shandong region ranging between 775-778 yuan/mt, down 1-5 yuan/mt WoW from last Friday, while transac on prices of PB fines at major ports in Hebei region stood at 780-785 yuan/mt, also down 1-5 yuan/mt WoW. Steel mills mainly procured based on demand for restocking, and market trading senment remained moderate.
